channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: My favorite game of 2026 so far just got a major free expansion — and you don’t even need to own the actual game to play it
item.description: Zero Parades for Dead spies has a TTRPG and one shot — and it’s all free-to-play.

item.title: Worried about Flock cameras? All new cars in the EU now need to have a camera aimed at the driver's face in the latest privacy nightmare
item.description: Every new car sold in the EU must now include a driver-monitoring camera, sparking latest data privacy row

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for July 10, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for July 10, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for July 10, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1847 on July 10 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Asus ProArt GeForce RTX 5090 review: a slimmer SFF-ready RTX 5090 for creators who need flagship performance and 32GB of VRAM
item.description: The Asus ProArt RTX 5090 offers flagship performance, 32GB of GDDR7 and a slimmer 2.5-slot design for creator-focused builds.
